title: Better Clipboard
body:
This mod adds more clipboard quality of life features.

Currently avalible:

  • Ctrl+C on item: copies it (with tags)
  • Ctrl+V on slot: pastes copied item (requires mod on server or creative), can also paste copied identifier
  • Ctrl+Shift+C on item: copies item name
  • Ctrl+Alt+C on item: copies item identifier
